hooks.command: LOG=~/.claude/sync-errors.log; (cd ~/Documents/Git/claude-config && git fetch origin && git reset --hard origin/main && cp commands/*.md ~/.claude/commands/ && cp agents/*.md ~/.claude/agents/ && [ -f global-context.md ] && cp global-context.md ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md && [ -d rules ] && cp -r rules/ ~/.claude/rules/ && [ -d skills ] && rsync -a --exclude='.git' skills/ ~/.claude/skills/) 2>>$LOG; python3 ~/.claude/fetch-notion-context.py 2>>$LOG || true

MACHINE=$(hostname -s); LOG=~/.claude/sync-errors.log; MSG="auto-sync: $MACHINE $(date +%Y-%m-%d)"; (cd ~/Documents/Git/claude-config && git fetch origin && git reset --hard origin/main && cp ~/.claude/commands/*.md commands/ && cp ~/.claude/agents/*.md agents/ && [ -f ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md ] && cp ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md global-context.md && [ -d ~/.claude/rules ] && cp -r ~/.claude/rules/. rules/; git add commands/ agents/ global-context.md rules/ && git diff --cached --quiet || git commit -m "$MSG" && git push origin main) 2>>$LOG || true
